verses.2: Don’t enter into judgment with your servant,
verses.3: For the enemy pursues my soul.
verses.4: Therefore my spirit is overwhelmed within me.
verses.5: I remember the days of old.
verses.6: I spread out my hands to you.
verses.8: Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning,
verses.9: Deliver me, LORD, from my enemies.
verses.10: Teach me to do your will,
verses.11: Revive me, LORD, for your name’s sake.
verses.12: In your loving kindness, cut off my enemies,
